name: missing-title
description: A required top-level manifest field is missing.

name: unexpected-top-level-field
description: The manifest contains a field not allowed by the schema.

name: invalid-status
description: The manifest status is outside the allowed enum.
expected_errors: pack.json.status: must be one of: active, archived, draft, in_review, reviewed

name: invalid-pack-id
description: The manifest pack_id does not match the required readable ID shape.
expected_errors: pack.json.pack_id: must match YYYY-MM-DD-topic-name using lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

name: absolute-record-path
description: A record path is absolute instead of relative to the pack folder.
expected_errors: records.source_records: path must be relative, got absolute path: /tmp/source-records.jsonl

name: bad-jsonl-line
description: A referenced JSONL record file contains an invalid JSON line.

name: record-parent-traversal
description: A record path tries to escape the evidence pack folder using parent traversal.
expected_errors: records.source_records: path must stay inside pack folder, got parent traversal: ../outside/source-records.jsonl

name: output-parent-traversal
description: An output path tries to escape the evidence pack folder using parent traversal.
expected_errors: outputs.final_brief: path must stay inside pack folder, got parent traversal: outputs/../../outside/final-brief.md

name: jsonl-record-missing-id
description: A JSONL record is an object but does not include the required id field.
expected_errors: JSONL record must have a non-empty string id

name: jsonl-record-not-object
description: A JSONL line parses as JSON but is not an object record.
expected_errors: JSONL record must be an object

name: jsonl-record-duplicate-id
description: Two JSONL records use the same id in one referenced JSONL file.

name: evidence-unknown-source-id
description: An evidence item points to a source_id that does not exist in source records.

name: evidence-unknown-claim-id
description: An evidence item points to a claim_id that does not exist in claim records.

name: authority-unknown-source-id
description: A source authority map record points to a source_id that does not exist in source records.

name: authority-unknown-related-claim-id
description: A source authority map record points to a related_claim_id that does not exist in claim records.
